body:
## Summary
- Add a local `SepoFooter` component with linked Quartz and Sepo attribution.
- Register it as the `footer`/`Footer` component so existing footer layout wiring uses it.

## Verification
- `npx -y -p node@22 node ./node_modules/prettier/bin/prettier.cjs quartz.ts quartz/components/SepoFooter.tsx --check`
- `npx -y -p node@22 node ./node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc --noEmit`
- `npx -y -p node@22 -p npm@10 npm run build`

Closes #2

comments.body:
The linked issue confirms the requested behavior and the clarified Sepo URL. I’m checking the footer loader contract now because this PR changes registration rather than the YAML layout itself.

---
_Run: `codex` / `gpt-5.5/xhigh` / `high`_

## AI Review Synthesis

<!-- sepo-agent-review-synthesis -->
<!-- sepo-agent-review-synthesis-head: 2cf274873ff4483ea4921ea2473acda3991962af -->

> Dual-agent review by **Claude** and **Codex**.
> Requested by @lolipopshock.

## Summary of PR/Issue
- PR #6 addresses issue #2, which asked for the footer to jointly say “Powered by Quartz and Sepo.”
- The linked issue clarified that Sepo should point to `https://self-evolving.app`.
- The PR adds a local [`SepoFooter`](https://github.com/self-evolving/literature-template/blob/2cf274873ff4483ea4921ea2473acda3991962af/quartz/components/SepoFooter.tsx) component and registers it as both `footer` and `Footer` in [`quartz.ts`](https://github.com/self-evolving/literature-template/blob/2cf274873ff4483ea4921ea2473acda3991962af/quartz.ts#L104).
- This matches the existing loader contract: local registry entries are available before layout loading resolves the footer component.

## Review
The current review artifacts do not identify any blocking or warning-level issues. The substantive reviewer output recommends shipping; the rubrics review artifact contains only an in-progress note and no completed findings, so there is no meaningful disagreement to reconcile.

| Issue | Severity | Description |
| -- | -- | -- |
| No actionable issues found | INFO | The implementation is small, scoped, and consistent with the footer loader path. Optional notes about URL slash consistency and inert YAML footer options do not require branch changes. |

## Progress
- Issue #2’s requested wording and Sepo URL are reflected in the PR implementation.
- Existing PR inline comments and review threads were fetched; none exist.
- No inline comments were posted, minimized, replied to, or resolved because there are no concrete line-specific actionable issues.
- The PR body reports Prettier, TypeScript, and full build verification.

## Recommended Next Step
NO_AUTOMATED_ACTION: No unresolved actionable branch-change work remains, and the remaining notes are optional/non-blocking.

## Final Verdict
SHIP

## Action Items
- [ ] No required branch-change work remains.

title: Add Sepo footer attribution link
